name: Seeds of Serenity
description:
Active: Verdurous Dale

Target the ground with a %radius% radius. Provides health regeneration to all allied units while they are in the area of effect equal to %aura_health_regen% + %aura_health_regen_pct%%% of the caster's health regeneration at the time of casting. Lasts %duration% seconds.
lore: An evergreen sprout treasured by the woodkin and highly coveted by interlopers and their like.
